title: include_exclude_object
description: Filters securities based on asset classes and other fields depending on the asset classes.

field.description: String containing the field name to filter on. Each asset class has its own set of field (i.e. equity_type, is_primary, region,etc)

entity.description: String containing the asset class for the filter to be applied on. If not included or left empty, it will apply the filter against all asset classes

values.description: Values you wish to filter on, as a comma-separated list. The values within this list are tied by an OR operation.
